acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this platform, you declare that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use the system.

usage.title: 2. Use of the Platform
usage.content: The platform is intended for managing and organizing vehicle-related information. Users agree to use the system only for lawful purposes and to provide accurate and up-to-date information.

account.title: 3. Account and Registration
account.content: When creating an account, the user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials and for all activities carried out under their account.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy
privacy.content: User information may be stored and used exclusively for platform functionality purposes, respecting basic privacy and data protection principles.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the use or inability to use the system.

changes.title: 6. Changes to the Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Users are encouraged to review this content periodically.

general.title: 7. General Provisions
general.content: Continued use of the platform after changes to the Terms will be interpreted as acceptance of the modifications.
